info.name: Consuelo API
info.description: API test suite for Consuelo — opensaas sales infrastructure platform

exec: // Note: This is a placeholder - actual refresh needs implementation

graphql.query: mutation GetLoginToken($email: String!, $password: String!, $origin: String!) { getLoginTokenFromCredentials(email: $email, password: $password, origin: $origin) { loginToken { token expiresAt } } }

mutation GetAuthTokens($loginToken: String!, $origin: String!) { getAuthTokensFromLoginToken(loginToken: $loginToken, origin: $origin) { tokens { accessOrWorkspaceAgnosticToken { token expiresAt } refreshToken { token expiresAt } } } }

exec: pm.test('Should contain access and refresh tokens', function() {

graphql.query: mutation RenewToken($appToken: String!) { renewToken(appToken: $appToken) { tokens { accessOrWorkspaceAgnosticToken { token expiresAt } refreshToken { token expiresAt } } } }

request.description: Set a phone number as primary
Look up conference by call SID
Twilio status callback for parallel calls
TwiML for parallel dial customer leg
Preview which caller ID for a given number

graphql.query: query { people(first: 10) { edges { node { id name { firstName lastName } emails { primaryEmail } } } } }

exec: pm.test('Should return people connection', function() { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.data?.people?.edges).to.exist; });

graphql.query: query { companies(first: 10) { edges { node { id name domainName { primaryLinkUrl } } } } }

exec: pm.test('Should return companies connection', function() { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.data?.companies?.edges).to.exist; });

graphql.query: mutation CreatePerson($input: PersonCreateInput!) { createPerson(data: $input) { id name { firstName lastName } } }

exec: pm.test('Should return created person', function() { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.data?.createPerson?.id).to.exist; });

graphql.query: mutation CreateCompany($input: CompanyCreateInput!) { createCompany(data: $input) { id name } }

exec: pm.test('Should return created company', function() { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.data?.createCompany?.id).to.exist; });
pm.test('Should return workspace info', function() { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.data?.currentWorkspace).to.exist; });
